mapper.update: update t_flow_wait_handle set num = 0 where employee_id = #{employeeId} and flow_type = #{flowType}
update t_flow_wait_handle set num = num + 1 where employee_id = #{employeeId} and flow_type = #{flowType}
mapper.select: select * from t_flow_wait_handle where employee_id = #{employeeId} and flow_type = #{flowType}
